title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details - Cancel button
scenario: Find My Device Cancel button does not dismiss the window and return to the device list when device is disconnected/out of range
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Tap the gray geo icon on the map.
6. Tap the X (Cancel) button on the pop-up window.
expected: The pop-up window is dismissed and the user returns to the Find My Device map view with the list of connected devices displayed.
